system.description:
A heavy iron disc stamped with the Chainwarden crest — a chain link enclosing a mountain pass. These tokens are issued to authorised travellers and toll-collectors. Presenting one at a Chainwarden checkpoint guarantees passage for one person, no questions asked.

Effect: When presented at a Chainwarden checkpoint, this token grants one party member free passage without negotiation, bribery, or paperwork. The token is surrendered upon use.

GM Notes

Found: Beat 4a (The Road to Stairwatch) — given by Bryn Ketilsdottir at the Hollow Waystation if the PCs share food with her. She insists on giving them 'her last useful possession.'

Alternative source: If the PCs defeat the optional Chainwarden Patrol encounter, Chain-Warden road tokens are found on the guards' bodies — useful for bluffing through future checkpoints.

If presented to Warden-Sergeant Eirik Greyhand at the Greypass Toll (Beat 4b), he recognises it and asks after Bryn (‘How’s Bryn? Still at the waystation?’). This does not spend a negotiation action — he simply lets one person through for free.

system.corruptionDescription: Using this artifact costs 1 temporary corruption.
